summary: W860 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while feeding the W859/W832 target-ExactAt left-calculus route from W725 closedness plus W726 endpoint/localized data. It derives W859 endpoint ExactAt closed-embedding, open-map, and epi facts from the W720 endpoint strict-topology component inside W726, and projects the W721 localized-right-adjoint data from the same provider. Product success remains false because concrete route inputs, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W860 derives W859 endpoint ExactAt facts and W721 localized-right-adjoint data from one W726 endpoint/localized provider, but still requires a matched W725 closedness branch, concrete W726 endpoint/localized data, W785 target ExactAt payload, finite limits, finite colimits, pretriangulated, and triangulated data.

The W856 homology-free selected-cochain provider is still not concretely instantiated; its boundary, relation, target-surjective/compact, closedness branch, normalized target, source triangulation, endpoint/localized data, and downstream target ExactAt payload fields remain open.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block one concrete W860 input next, preferably the W726 endpoint/localized provider, a matched W725 closedness branch, or the W785 target ExactAt payload.
Connect the W860 route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
